title: [codereview1] header update misses encode_status_cbor capacity encoding and map_count update
description: After struct update in coap_status.h, the encode_status_cbor in coap_status.c still uses old map_count=4+optionals and does not encode txq/fwd fields or perform capacity check. Must fix to use fixed 8 or updated count and add encoding for new fields. Zephyr style requires no non-SPDX comments which was done in header but c file still has many.
close_reason: 3 codereview passes complete with no open findings after fixes; capacity fields added to struct, checks implemented in encode_status_cbor (fixed map+validation) and neighbors_get (count>MAX error); all non-SPDX comments removed, Zephyr style; build and tests passed
